/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o AudioStreamVST_artefacts/Release/VST3/AudioStreamVST.vst3/Contents/MacOS/AudioStreamVST "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/AudioStreamVST_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o"  AudioStreamVST_artefacts/Release/libAudioStreamVST_SharedCode.a -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework Accelerate -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -flto -Wl,-weak_reference_mismatches,weak
